meta.title: Approccio commerciale
meta.subtitle: Outreach sistematico, non ad-hoc. Sette template, quattro follow-up, una routine settimanale.
meta.source: Diusapet USA Cowork Sales Playbook v1.0

follow_up_sequence.title: L'80% delle conversioni arriva dai follow-up.
follow_up_sequence.subtitle: La prima email ha il 2-3% di risposta. Ogni follow-up aggiunge punti percentuali. Non si molla dopo la prima.

touches.name: Email iniziale
touches.angle: Hook personalizzato + value prop + CTA campioni

touches.name: Follow-up 1
touches.angle: Ricorda il contesto + social proof nuova + CTA soft

touches.name: Follow-up 2
touches.angle: Cambia angolo (se tecnico prima → emozionale ora)

touches.name: Break-up email
touches.angle: "Capisco che non è il momento" — chiude il cerchio

touches.name: Cold re-engage
touches.angle: News / novità prodotto dopo un trimestre

follow_up_sequence.insight: Contro-intuitivo: la break-up email è spesso la mail che converte di più. Rimuove pressione, crea reciprocità, attiva la paura di perdere l'opportunità ("aspetta, dammi altri due giorni").

email_templates.title: Sette angoli, sette template.
email_templates.subtitle: Ogni tipo di contatto ha il suo angolo di attacco. Niente email generiche.

templates.name: Italian heritage angle
templates.when_to_use: Contatti con cognome italiano (D'Elia, Longo, Rizzo), negozi in Italian neighborhoods (Edison, Hoboken, Bay Ridge), clientela italoamericana dichiarata.
templates.subject: First Italian-made pet food for [Hoboken]
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

I noticed [Store Name] serves a strong Italian-American customer base in [neighborhood] — my family is from [region] and I'm writing because we're about to launch the first Italian-made premium pet food in the US market.

• Alleva is made in central Italy, 46% protein, Aloe + Ginseng + Hemp as functional ingredients.
• Your Italian customers will recognize quality the moment they see the bag.
• 46% retailer margin vs 35-38% on competing imports.

Can I drop off a free sample pack — 4 SKUs, 2 bags each, zero commitment?

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA · +1 (201) xxx-xxxx · allevastore.com

templates.name: Holistic / nutrition angle
templates.when_to_use: Owner con certificazioni nutrizione (es. Mike @ Hoboken Pet), store holistic-focused, negozi che vendono raw e freeze-dried.
templates.subject: 46% protein, 4000mg taurine — thought you'd want a look
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

Saw that [Store Name] is one of the few stores in [zone] where customers get a real nutritional conversation — [specific: your raw selection / your cat formulas / your owner certification]. That's rare, and the reason I'm writing.

I'm launching Alleva, Italian-made premium pet food, in the US:
• 46% protein (vs US average 22-28%)
• 4000mg/kg taurine in cat formulas (4-8x the AAFCO minimum)
• Functional ingredients: Aloe, Ginseng, Hemp — not marketing fluff, real inclusions

Happy to drop off a free sample pack. No pitch, just let the formulas speak.

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA

templates.name: Orijen-shelf angle
templates.when_to_use: Store che vendono Orijen, Acana, Fromm a $28-35. Clientela già educata al premium, pronta a pagare.
templates.subject: Same shelf as Orijen, better margin for you
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

Noticed [Store Name] carries Orijen and Acana — your customers clearly value premium quality. I'm writing because I'm launching a brand that sits right next to those on the shelf with one key difference.

Alleva is Italian-made premium, positioned $23-26 retail (vs Orijen $28-35):
• Comparable protein levels (27-46% depending on SKU)
• Functional ingredients competitors don't have
• 46% retailer margin — 8-10 points above what Orijen typically gives you

A free sample pack next week? 4 SKUs, 2 bags each, no commitment.

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA

templates.name: Cat specialty angle
templates.when_to_use: Cat-only stores, negozi con sezione cat grande, breeder di gatti. La nostra linea gatto con taurina 4000mg è un argomento forte.
templates.subject: 4x the taurine — finally a cat formula worth carrying
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

Cat stores in [zone] are rare — and ones that actually push nutrition standards forward even rarer. That's why I'm writing to [Store Name].

I'm launching Alleva's cat line in the US — Italian formulas built with higher nutritional standards than anything currently on US shelves:
• Taurine 4000 mg/kg (4-8x the AAFCO minimum)
• Protein 30-46% depending on life stage
• Four SKUs: Kitten, Adult, Ocean Fish, Light Hairball

Your cat customers will know the difference on the first bag. Free sample pack?

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA

templates.name: Italian breed angle
templates.when_to_use: Allevatori di Cane Corso, Bracco Italiano, Lagotto, Maremma, Italian Greyhound. L'italianità è un vantaggio emozionale fortissimo.
templates.subject: Italian kibble for Italian dogs — would you try it?
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

Your work with [breed: Cane Corso / Bracco / Lagotto] caught my attention — [specific: the litter you posted in Dec / your breed championship / your AKC Merit status]. As an Italian raising Italian-origin dogs, I thought you'd want to know about this.

I'm launching Alleva in the US — premium kibble made in central Italy. Formulas developed with Italian vet nutritionists:
• 46% protein puppy / 27-38% adult
• Grain-free, with Aloe + Hemp
• Honest supply chain — the factory I can walk into

Can I send you two bags for your [breed]? No strings.

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA

templates.name: Italian specialty store angle
templates.when_to_use: Italian deli, salumerie, mercati italiani, Eataly. Non sono pet store ma vendono italianità — categoria adiacente.
templates.subject: First Italian pet food — a natural fit for your shelves
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

Your customers already trust [Store Name] to bring them the real Italy — [specific: your cured meats / your pasta selection / your olive oil range]. I'm writing because there's one Italian category no one has brought over yet: premium pet food.

Alleva is made in central Italy, the first Made in Italy pet food brand in the US. Two reasons it fits your shelf:
• Your Italian-American customers already spend premium on Italian authenticity
• Zero competition — you'd be the only store in [zone] with Italian kibble

4 SKUs, ready to ship. Free sample pack?

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA

templates.name: Distributor angle
templates.when_to_use: Distributori pet food indipendenti con portafoglio europeo (Farmina, Ziwi, Carna4). 30-150 retailer serviti.
templates.subject: Category whitespace — first Italian premium pet food
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

[Company] is one of the few distributors in [region] that's taken real positions on European premium — [specific: Farmina, Ziwi, Carna4]. That's exactly why I'm writing.

I run Diusapet USA, the American entity for the Alleva brand — Italian-made premium pet food launching Q2 2026 out of our NJ warehouse. There is currently zero Italian presence in the $136B US pet food market.

• 8 SKUs, 41-47% margin at distributor pricing
• FSVP-compliant, ready for import
• Exclusive regional agreements available for the first three distributors

Would a 10-min intro call next week make sense?

Daniele Franceschini
Diusapet USA

subject_patterns.title: Il subject è il 70% del gioco.
subject_patterns.subtitle: Nessuno apre "Introducing Alleva". Aprono oggetti con un numero, un beneficio o una curiosità legittima.

that_work.example: Same shelf as Orijen, better margin
Italian kibble for Italian dogs — try it?
First Italian pet food for Bay Ridge
Aloe + Hemp in premium kibble — seen it?

forbidden.reason: Si tagliano su mobile (70% dei buyer legge lì)

cta_formulas.title: Le tre CTA che convertono.
cta_formulas.subtitle: La CTA più efficace chiede qualcosa di così piccolo che il "no" suonerebbe scortese.

items.name: Free sample pack
items.phrasing: Can I drop off a free sample pack — 4 SKUs, 2 bags each, zero commitment?
items.use: CTA principale per tutti i pet store e Italian deli

items.name: 10-min intro call
items.phrasing: Would a 10-min intro call next week make sense?

items.name: Reply anziché apply
items.phrasing: If now isn't the right timing, even a one-line 'not for us' helps me move forward.
items.use: Follow-up T+12 — apre la porta al rifiuto facile

three_numbers.title: I tre numeri non-negoziabili.
three_numbers.subtitle: Se una email non contiene almeno uno di questi, non sta vendendo Alleva.

numbers.label: taurina
numbers.context: 4-8× il minimo AAFCO — salute cardiaca felina
numbers.use_with: Cat specialty, vet channel, breeder felini

numbers.label: retailer margin
numbers.use_with: Tutti i retailer (core value prop commerciale)

weekly_routine.title: La routine settimanale del MD.
weekly_routine.subtitle: Per ottenere compounding serve disciplina. 12 settimane di questa routine = pipeline solida e misurabile.

activities: Decide priorità: zona scouting + batch email
Lancia scouting per la zona scelta
Invio nello stesso thread (reply, non nuova email)
Chiamate ai top 5 HOT che non hanno risposto
+40% response rate dopo 2 email e 1 call

funnel_kpi.title: Sei metriche che misurano il funnel.
funnel_kpi.subtitle: Se una metrica scivola sotto il target, si interviene su una variabile precisa.

metrics.if_below: Value prop non allineata al profilo
Se >15h: stai inseguendo i prospect sbagliati

closing_callout: Sette angoli, quattro follow-up, una routine. Cowork moltiplica l'esecuzione — l'ultimo miglio resta umano: rileggere ogni email prima dell'invio. Se esce un dettaglio sbagliato ("vendete Orijen" quando non è vero) si perde trust in modo irrecuperabile.
